StepAction: 建置 帳號manager service (account/manager.ts) 使用 API signature 與 wrap 驗證+帳號
Condition: 帳號manager module created 使用 all method signatures

StepAction: Integrate typed 事件 bus: define 帳號 事件 與 發出 來自 each mutation method
Condition: All mutation methods 發出 typed 事件 透過 packages/bus

StepAction: Implement write-ahead 儲存 pattern (temp → rename → 更新 memory) 與 Provider capability declaration
Condition: save() uses write-ahead; Provider hardcode replaced 使用 capability lookups

StepAction: Setup 事件 consumers: TUI subscriber, Web SSE 通道, Console SSE listener
Condition: Consumers receive 帳號 事件 與 更新 狀態; end-到-end verified

StepAction: 路由 Service Delegation (Slice ): delegate all mutation 路由 到 帳號manager, add mismatch guard (400), remove daemon fallback
Condition: All mutation 路由 delegate 到 帳號manager; 無 direct 帳號/驗證 calls 在 路由; mismatch 返回 400

SubGrafcet.StepAction: Rewrite 清單/setActive/rename 路由 到 delegate 到 帳號manager
Rewrite remove/connect/登入/配額 路由 與 add mismatch guard
Condition: All 路由 delegated; mismatch guard active

SubGrafcet.StepAction: Remove 使用者daemonmanager fallback 路徑 (daemon fail → 503, 無 fallback)
Condition: 無 fallback 路徑 exists 在 路由 layer

StepAction: 靜默 fallback Elimination (Slice B): 驗證.set disclosure, mutation 目標 validation, explicit migration logging
Condition: 驗證.set 返回 action disclosure; 缺失 targets 返回 404; migrations 記錄 explicitly

StepAction: CLI/TUI Mutation Convergence (Slice C): replace all direct 帳號/驗證 mutations 使用 帳號manager calls
Condition: 無 direct 帳號.setActive/remove/更新 或 驗證.set/remove 在 CLI/TUI; mutations 發出 事件

StepAction: Authority Unification (Slice D): implement Session-local ephemeral selection, separate UI badges, handle 帳號 deletion fallback
Condition: Session-local selection 是 ephemeral; 全域 active unchanged 由 模型-manager selection; UI badges differentiated

StepAction: Surface Alignment (Slice E): unify app/console form semantics, 路由 模型-manager actions through 帳號manager, replace console 重載 使用 SSE
Condition: Form fields canonical; 模型-manager actions go through service; console uses SSE sync

StepAction: 部署 Gate + Legacy Cleanup (Slice F): automate SHA256 gate 在 webctl.sh, eliminate 解析Provider/解析family entirely, remove all family type exports/helpers, rename canonical-family-來源 → canonical-Provider-來源, migrate 儲存 key
Condition: All family code eliminated, 無 residual FamilyData/FAMILIES/解析family/解析family

StepAction: Finalize: 更新 architecture.md, 事件 logs, 執行 regression (ghost responses), 完成 cross-cutting tasks
Condition: All slices validated; architecture synced; 無 ghost responses regression

StepAction: Verify UX invariance: TUI 管理 面板 與 webapp 模型 manager operation flow unchanged after refactor
Condition: UX regression test passed: TUI 管理 面板 + webapp 模型 manager flows verified identical
